page_metadata.biotools__summary: PRUNE is a web server for the selection of a subset of protein-protein docking poses generated during sampling search using an interface area based edge-scoring function. PROBE is a web server for refining, scoring and ranking of the resulting protein-protein docking poses using a regression model.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PRUNE is a web server for the selection of a subset of protein-protein docking poses generated during sampling search using an interface area based edge-scoring function. PROBE is a web server for refining, scoring and ranking of the resulting protein-protein docking poses using a regression model.
